attacking_style: Does not appear to be a primary attacker. Functions as a domestique who animates climbs early to set up teammates, willing to expend energy before decisive moves.
team_tactics: Deployed in pure support roles: bottle duty, late-climb pacing for leaders (Roglic), and early animation to soften opposition before teammates' winning moves. Often isolated after completing duties.
terrain_preference: Final climbs where he can set tempo and burn matches early for protected riders. No evidence of sprinting or TT specialization.
vulnerability: Vulnerable when team tactics change mid-race (left isolated 1:51 behind after Van Aert prioritization). COVID vulnerability removed him during critical Alpine stages, suggesting difficulty being replaced.
key_patterns: Sacrificial domestique role: isolated or distanced after completing support duties across multiple Grand Tours
Final climb animation specialist: repeatedly deployed to attack/pace before teammates' winning moves
Critical support timing: positioned as last remaining domestique with leaders on decisive climbs
Team reliance indicator: withdrawal or isolation described as 'significant tactical loss' or 'team weakness'
form_trajectory: unknown: most recent data from 2022 COVID withdrawal provides no performance insight beyond availability issues
